Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}So that "Abyss of Time" down there is what caused all this, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}Guess we'll have to go in and try to figure this all out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}Sounds like no one has a clue what's really in there, but that's all the more reason to check it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}Didn't your sister say there are multiple of them too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Now that we can get to Kurosawa-san, I guess we're good to go for a long haul.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}How long is this all gonna take...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1003 0 0}We've checked out barely any of the doors down there. We should pick up the pace.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}Let's try to just get this over with as fast as we can. Otherwise, we'll be here forever...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}About Metis... Maybe I've just been misunderstanding her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}I mean, she doesn't seem like a bad person or anything... We just didn't exactly get off on the right foot with her, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}I get the feeling she's just... overly protective.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}So as long as you keep an eye on her, I don't think she'll really be dangerous to us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Hm... Well, make sure you keep a close eye on her, then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}If nothing else, it seems like she'll at least listen to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}I know there isn't really a reason to check the schedule since we're just exploring all the time now, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}I don't know... I guess I keep looking at it out of habit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}I never knew his dad's an alcoholic... I think I kinda get how he feels.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}It's not like I just pity him or anything. It's... I don't know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1084 0 0}It feels so long ago now, but... I used to not really like Mitsuru-senpai very much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}It's like I thought I was the only one going through stuff. And I had all these assumptions and made her out to be the bad guy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}That strange figure somehow always appears just ahead of us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}How long is it gonna keep this up? I wish it'd just show itself already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}When someone says something that hits a nerve, it's probably because there's some truth in what they said.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}When she said how all we talk and laugh about is stuff from our past, I wanted to be like, "You don't know anything about our past!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}But maybe her not having the whole picture of our past is exactly why she's actually right. Even if we're not doing it intentionally...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1076 0 0}If we want to solve this, we just gotta reach the end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}So we might as well get going instead of wasting our time trying to figure it all out ourselves first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}I wanna see what that figure really is too... Let's go end this whole thing already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1065 0 0}I'm not trying to say I'm objectively right here or anything, but we don't have enough time to keep arguing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}Toward the end of our fight with Nyx, I couldn't even move. All I could do was watch as he left us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}So I want to go back and leave no regrets this time. I mean, facing our regrets was the whole point of all this, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}And you need to come to a decision too. I won't accept that you just don't have any opinions about this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1004 0 0}I think... I'm actually glad that I lost to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}If I tried to do the past over again with the mindset I was in, I probably would've ended up having even more regrets...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}It's... honestly embarrassing how little I've processed everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}You could've died if you lost your key?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}Why didn't you say anything? I would've...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1056 0 0}Actually... I probably would've done everything the same anyways. I was only thinking about myself. I'm so sorry...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some[n]time with Yukari-san...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1075 0 0}Oh. Okay, then. Uh... Wanna chat for a bit?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}I've been reading this {f 4 4 0 37 1 16775} and it's really getting good.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}Maybe we can read together. Are there any books you've been meaning to check out?[n]{f 1 1}
